project.name: Mesaas CRM
project.description: Social media agency CRM (internal dashboard), Hub (client-facing portal), and Admin (platform operations). Portuguese-language UI.

cards.title: Hub functions (9)
cards.subtitle: bootstrap · posts · approve · brand · briefing · ideias · feed · pages · dashboard

cards.title: File & media fns (11)
cards.subtitle: upload · manage · media · zip · sign
cards.note: post-media-upload-url, post-media-finalize, and post-media-backfill-thumbnails are orphaned — client calls file-upload-url/finalize instead

cards.title: Cron jobs (9)
cards.subtitle: publish · refresh · sync · deadlines · cleanup · reports

flows.title: User Authentication
flows.description: Agency user signs in to the CRM dashboard

steps.title: Agency Owner → CRM App
steps.description: User navigates to the CRM login page.

steps.title: CRM App → AuthContext
steps.description: Calls Supabase Auth via the AuthContext provider.

steps.title: AuthContext → Supabase Auth
steps.description: Authenticates credentials, returns JWT session.

steps.title: AuthContext → Postgres
steps.description: Fetches role (owner/admin/agent) from profiles table.

steps.title: AuthContext → CRM App
steps.description: AuthProvider populates context, app renders protected routes.

flows.title: Instagram OAuth Connection
flows.description: Connect a client's Instagram account to the CRM

steps.title: Agency Owner → Cliente Detalhe
steps.description: Opens Instagram tab on client detail page.

steps.title: services/instagram → instagram-integration
steps.description: Requests OAuth URL from edge function with JWT.

steps.title: instagram-integration → Postgres
steps.description: HMAC-SHA256 signed one-time nonce for CSRF protection.

steps.title: instagram-integration → Meta API
steps.description: Builds Business Login URL with signed state parameter.

steps.title: Meta API → instagram-integration
steps.description: Instagram redirects back with authorization code.

steps.title: instagram-integration → Meta API
steps.description: Gets 60-day token via graph.instagram.com/access_token.

steps.title: instagram-integration → Postgres
steps.description: AES-GCM encrypts token, upserts instagram_accounts, seeds posts.

steps.title: instagram-integration → CRM App
steps.description: Returns user to client detail page with connected account.

flows.title: Post Lifecycle & Publish
flows.description: Full lifecycle: draft → internal review → client approval → schedule → publish

steps.title: Agent → Entregas
steps.description: Adds workflow_posts row with status 'rascunho' (draft).

steps.title: postMedia → File functions
steps.description: file-upload-url → R2 PUT → file-upload-finalize. Inserts files + post_file_links.

steps.title: postMedia → R2
steps.description: Direct XHR upload with progress. Client-side thumbnail and blur hash generation.

steps.title: Agent → Entregas
steps.description: Moves post through internal review. Alt: skip to enviado_cliente.

steps.title: Owner → Entregas
steps.description: Internal approval (aprovado_interno), then sent to client for review.

steps.title: Client → Hub App
steps.description: Client approves (aprovado_cliente) or requests correction (correcao_cliente).

steps.title: Hub App → hub-approve
steps.description: Inserts post_approvals row. If auto_publish_on_approval is on, sets status to agendado.

steps.title: services/instagram → instagram-publish
steps.description: Manual schedule. Also supports cancel, retry, and publish-now actions.

steps.title: instagram-publish → Meta API
steps.description: Creates single/carousel/video container via Graph API.

steps.title: Cron → Meta API
steps.description: instagram-publish-cron claims due posts, publishes container. On failure: falha_publicacao.

steps.title: Cron → Postgres
steps.description: Stores instagram_media_id and permalink. Full state machine: rascunho → revisao_interna → aprovado_interno → enviado_cliente → aprovado_cliente → agendado → postado.

flows.title: Hub Client Portal Access
flows.description: Client accesses their portal to view posts, brand, and analytics

steps.title: End User → Hub App
steps.description: Client accesses their unique portal URL.

steps.title: Hub App → Hub functions
steps.description: Validates token, returns workspace config and feature flags.

steps.title: Hub functions → Postgres
steps.description: Verifies token is active and not expired.

steps.title: Hub App → Hub functions
steps.description: Fetches posts pending client approval.

steps.title: Hub functions → R2
steps.description: Generates presigned GET URLs for post media display.

steps.title: Hub App → Hub functions
steps.description: Fetches brand kit (logo, colors, fonts, files).

steps.title: Hub App → Hub functions
steps.description: Fetches analytics data for Hub homepage.

steps.title: Hub functions → Meta API
steps.description: Decrypts token, fetches follower/reach data from Graph API.

flows.title: Analytics & AI Analysis
flows.description: View portfolio analytics, per-account insights, and AI-powered analysis

steps.title: Agency Owner → Analytics
steps.description: Portfolio-level overview of all connected Instagram accounts.

steps.title: services/analytics → Postgres
steps.description: Queries posts, accounts, follower history via Supabase client.

steps.title: Agency Owner → Analytics Conta
steps.description: Opens detailed analytics for a single Instagram account.

steps.title: services/analytics → instagram-analytics
steps.description: Requests audience insights via edge function.

steps.title: instagram-analytics → Meta API
steps.description: Graph API call for demographics, best posting times.

steps.title: instagram-analytics → Cache
steps.description: Stores in instagram_analytics_cache table to reduce API calls.

steps.title: Agency Owner → Analytics Conta
steps.description: Clicks AI analysis button on the per-account page.

steps.title: instagram-analytics → Gemini
steps.description: Sends post data for structured performance analysis.

steps.title: instagram-analytics → Analytics Conta
steps.description: JSON with insights, recommendations, and metrics.

flows.title: Media Upload Pipeline
flows.description: Upload images/videos to a post via presigned R2 URLs. Writes to files + post_file_links tables.

steps.title: Agency Agent → Entregas
steps.description: Drag or pick image/video files for a workflow post.

steps.title: services/postMedia → file-upload-url
steps.description: Edge function generates R2 PUT URL and creates file_upload_slots record.

steps.title: file-upload-url → R2
steps.description: Creates presigned URL with content-type and size limit.

steps.title: services/postMedia → R2
steps.description: Direct upload with progress; thumbnail and blur hash generated client-side.

steps.title: services/postMedia → file-upload-finalize
steps.description: Confirms R2 object exists via file-upload-finalize.

steps.title: file-upload-finalize → Postgres
steps.description: Inserts into files table via RPC, checks workspace quota.

steps.title: file-upload-finalize → Postgres
steps.description: Links the file to the post via post_file_links (not post_media). Note: orphaned post-media-upload-url and post-media-finalize functions use post_media table but are not called by the client.

flows.title: Team Invite & Onboarding
flows.description: Owner invites a new team member who joins the workspace

steps.title: Agency Owner → Configuracao
steps.description: Specifies email and role (admin or agent).

steps.title: Configuracao → invite-user
steps.description: Calls invite-user edge function with JWT auth.

steps.title: invite-user → Supabase Auth
steps.description: Creates invited user in auth.users with random password.

steps.title: invite-user → Postgres
steps.description: Stores invite with TTL and status; sends invitation email.

steps.title: CRM App → AuthContext
steps.description: Invited user opens CRM and logs in for the first time.

steps.title: AuthContext → Postgres
steps.description: Auto-accepts workspace membership on first login.

flows.title: Admin Portal Management
flows.description: Platform super-admin manages workspaces, plans, admins, and banners

steps.title: Platform Admin → Admin App
steps.description: Super-admin navigates to the platform admin interface.

steps.title: Admin App → platform-admin
steps.description: Checks admin role via JWT against platform_admins table.

steps.title: platform-admin → Supabase Auth
steps.description: Confirms user has a valid session and platform_admins entry.

steps.title: Admin App → platform-admin
steps.description: Fetches all workspaces with plans, members, and usage data.

steps.title: platform-admin → Postgres
steps.description: Joins workspaces, plans, workspace_members with aggregated usage.

steps.title: Platform Admin → Admin App
steps.description: CRUD operations: create-plan, update-plan, set-workspace-plan, create-banner, invite-admin.

steps.title: Admin App → platform-admin
steps.description: Modifies plans (11 resource caps, 18 feature flags) or global_banners.

steps.title: platform-admin → Postgres
steps.description: Updates plans, global_banners, or platform_admins tables.

flows.title: Hub Content Experience
flows.description: Client explores brand kit, custom pages, briefing, and submits content ideas

steps.title: Client → Hub App
steps.description: Client views brand kit page with logo, colors, fonts.

steps.title: Hub App → hub-brand
steps.description: Returns hub_brand + hub_brand_files with signed R2 URLs.

steps.title: hub-brand → R2
steps.description: Generates presigned GET URLs for brand file downloads.

steps.title: Client → Hub App
steps.description: Client views custom rich-text pages created by agency.

steps.title: Hub App → hub-pages
steps.description: Returns hub_pages with rich-text content per page.

steps.title: Client → Hub App
steps.description: Client answers briefing questions from agency.

steps.title: Hub App → hub-briefing
steps.description: Reads questions by section, submits answers. Stored in hub_briefing_questions.

steps.title: Client → Hub App
steps.description: Client submits content ideas for the agency to review.

steps.title: Hub App → hub-ideias
steps.description: Creates ideia row with status 'nova' in ideias table.

steps.title: Hub functions → Postgres
steps.description: Writes to hub_briefing_questions and ideias tables.

flows.title: Instagram Token Lifecycle
flows.description: Automated token refresh, account sync, and disconnect handling

steps.title: instagram-refresh-cron → Postgres
steps.description: Finds instagram_accounts with tokens expiring within 7 days.

steps.title: instagram-refresh-cron → Meta API
steps.description: Exchanges expiring token for new 60-day token.

steps.title: instagram-refresh-cron → Postgres
steps.description: AES-GCM encrypts and updates instagram_accounts. Stale tokens marked authorization_status: revoked.

steps.title: instagram-sync-cron → Postgres
steps.description: Finds accounts with auto_sync_enabled = true.

steps.title: instagram-sync-cron → Meta API
steps.description: Calls Graph API for account insights and recent posts.

steps.title: instagram-sync-cron → Postgres
steps.description: Upserts instagram_posts, instagram_follower_history with latest data.

suggestedFlows: Notification system (deadline alerts, approval notifications, global banners)

hub.name: hub-posts
hub.purpose: Post list with signed media URLs

files.name: file-upload-url
files.purpose: Presigned R2 PUT URL + upload slot

files.name: file-manage
files.purpose: Folder tree CRUD + signed GET URLs

files.name: post-media-manage
files.purpose: Post media CRUD via post_file_links (cover, sort, delete)

files.name: post-media-finalize
files.purpose: Insert into post_media table via RPC

workspace.name: workspace-limits
workspace.purpose: Plan caps + 18 feature flags + rate limits

workspace.name: manage-workspace-user
workspace.purpose: Accept invite, change role, remove user

reports.name: analytics-report-cron
reports.purpose: Monthly report generation for all accounts

architecturePatterns.multiTenancy: Every row has conta_id (workspace UUID). RLS enforces isolation. profiles.conta_id = active workspace.
architecturePatterns.planGating: workspace-limits edge function + useWorkspaceLimits hook. 11 resource caps, 18 boolean feature flags, and 3 rate limits from plans table.
architecturePatterns.tokenSecurity: Instagram long-lived tokens encrypted with AES-GCM using HKDF-derived key from TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY. Legacy padEnd tokens transparently migrated.
architecturePatterns.hubSecurity: No Supabase auth in Hub. All 9 hub functions deployed with --no-verify-jwt. Validate UUID hub token from client_hub_tokens.
architecturePatterns.roleBased: Three roles: owner | admin | agent. Both owner and admin have full CRM access. Agent role hides financials, removes Leads/Financeiro/Contratos/Equipe from nav and route access.
architecturePatterns.postStateMachine: 9 states: rascunho -> revisao_interna -> aprovado_interno -> enviado_cliente -> aprovado_cliente | correcao_cliente -> agendado -> postado | falha_publicacao. Additional actions: cancel (agendado -> aprovado_cliente), retry (falha_publicacao -> agendado), publish-now (aprovado_cliente -> postado). Auto-publish: hub-approve checks auto_publish_on_approval flag.
architecturePatterns.deadlineEngine: Three modes: padrao (rolling), data_fixa (manual), data_entrega (backward from client dia_entrega). Business day calculations.
architecturePatterns.twoPortals: Legacy portal (per-workflow tokens, step approvals) + Hub (per-client tokens, full experience with brand/briefing/ideias/post approvals).
architecturePatterns.mediaStorage: Active path: file-upload-url -> R2 -> file-upload-finalize -> files + post_file_links. Orphaned path: post-media-upload-url -> R2 -> post-media-finalize -> post_media. post-media-manage reads from post_file_links (active path).
